title: taraxacum glaucum
intro: Taraxacum glaucum, also known as the Welsh dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum glaucum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
